new_value: Implemented: SQLiteStore with durable state, gate.executed marker prevents re-execution, idempotency test passes
Implemented: admin token auth, signature verification on all messages, credential scrubbing, audit logging
Implemented: 918 lines of tests covering replay, signatures, expiration, duplicates, idempotency, threshold enforcement
Schemas defined implicitly through GateSignable, ApprovalSignable, GateConversationMessage types. Wire format documented in spec_test.go.
